ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crop_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crop performance record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded performance */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Overall summary of crop performance for the year */,
  "clay_performance" TEXT /* Performance data for clay soil type */,
  "hard_performance" TEXT /* Performance data for hard soil type */,
  "indoors_performance" TEXT /* Performance data for indoor growing conditions */,
  "grass_performance" TEXT /* Performance data for grass growing conditions */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crop */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_used" TEXT /* Type of pesticide used */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was harvested */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_performance_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES agricultural_researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type (e.g., Clay, Hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil characteristics */,
  "nutrient_content" TEXT /* Nutrient content of the soil */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "drainage_quality" TEXT /* Drainage quality of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growing_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growing condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the growing condition (e.g., Indoors, Grass) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growing condition characteristics */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions (e.g., full sun, partial shade) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range during the growing period */,
  "humidity_level" TEXT /* Humidity level during the growing period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_statistics" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop performance record */,
  "yield_amount" REAL /* Amount of yield produced (e.g., quantity in tons) */,
  "yield_type" TEXT /* Type of yield (e.g., total, marketable) */,
  "yield_date" TEXT /* Date the yield was measured */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit used for measuring the yield (e.g., tons, kilograms) */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_statistics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES crop_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's photo */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES agricultural_researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES crop_performance ("performance_id")
)
